acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, especially for max payout and third-party suits. Free consult.
acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, for complex claims involving third-parties or denials; Idaho workers' comp lawyers maximize benefits free upfront.[6] Context: Insurers lowball without counsel. Key factors: OSHA expertise, lien negotiation. Practical guidance: Free consult; no win no fee. Handle alone risks less money.
